channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. and Iran launch direct negotiations in Switzerland
item.description: Vice President J.D. Vance and other U.S. negotiators met with their Iranian counterparts at the BÃ¼rgenstock ski resort in Switzerland on Sunday for th...

item.title: World Cup visitors to America should remember to tip
item.description: Millions of World Cup visitors encounter American cuisine for the first time, and tipping is an unfamiliar practice.

item.title: Deadline looms for Trump's border wall completion
item.description: A closer look at Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin's claim that the border wall will be finished within a year reveals challenges.

item.title: Iran announces closure of Strait of Hormuz after Israeli attacks on Lebanon
item.description: Iran's armed forces said Saturday they will close the Strait of Hormuz, citing America's failure to respond to Israeli attacks on Lebanon.
